copy.inventoryTitle: Filterable Blocket inventory for automatic passenger cars under 50,000 SEK within 200 km of Uppsala
copy.inventoryIntroHtml: Search date: 2026-05-17. Source: Blocket only. This is the widened run that approximates Stockholm, Uppsala, Gavle, Vasteras, and the surrounding ~3-hour driving area.
copy.shortlistTitle: Curated shortlist for automatic commuter cars within 200 km of Uppsala
copy.shortlistIntroHtml: Built from the widened Blocket run dated 2026-05-17. The full searchable inventory is below on this same page.
copy.serviceDisclaimer: Service-due and forum-watchout notes are mileage-based heuristics from known model-family weak points, not proof that the seller already handled the work.
copy.inventoryBottomLineHtml: If the goal is cheap automatic transport with the lowest risk of an ugly gearbox surprise, I would start with the Prius entries first and the Honda Jazz entries second. The small Aygo / 107 / C1 cars are still in the pool, but the robotized gearbox is their catch. I would actively de-rank Yaris/Auris MultiMode, Peugeot 207 automatic, and older Polo automatics.
copy.shortlistBottomLineHtml: Prius first, Jazz second, low-mileage Accent as a wildcard. The small Aygo / 107 / C1 cars can still make sense, but only if the robotized gearbox is clearly healthy. I would actively de-rank Yaris / Auris MultiMode, Peugeot 207 automatic, and older Polo automatics.
copy.inventoryFilterIntro: Use the dropdown filters first (brand, model, location, fuel, seller, body, risk), then refine with optional text search. Search matches all words by default, and you can use | for OR (example: Prius | Jazz). Cars marked Unrated are hidden by default unless you switch Unrated cars to include.

shortlistCards.label: matching cars in the full cleaned inventory

rules: Prius and Jazz are ranked highest on model-level reliability.
Aygo / 107 / C1 stay available, but are flagged for robotized gearbox risk.
Yaris / Auris MultiMode are not treated as safe just because they are Toyotas.
Peugeot 207 automatic and older Polo automatics are de-ranked.

priusComparison.forumWatchouts: Prius forums keep flagging battery aging, brake-actuator chirp, inverter pump failure, oil use, and rust.

shortlists.title: Reliability-first shortlist
shortlists.description: These are the cars I would start with if the main goal is to reduce the odds of a major drivetrain or gearbox failure over the next 2-3 years.

items.riskNote: Best model-level reliability signal in this widened budget pool.
items.serviceDue: Soon: e-CVT fluid if undocumented, plugs/coolant history, water-pump check, and suspension inspection.
items.serviceCost: 2k-7k SEK routine; 14k-27k if battery or brake actuator appears later
items.forumWatchouts: Owner reports focus on battery health, inverter pump, brake actuator, AC compressor cost, and underbody rust.
items.shortlistNote: Best all-round bet in the pool: strong Prius reliability record, local to Uppsala, and still inside budget.

items.riskNote: Best model-level reliability signal in this widened budget pool.
items.serviceDue: Soon: e-CVT fluid if undocumented, plugs/coolant history, water-pump check, and suspension inspection.
items.serviceCost: 2k-7k SEK routine; 14k-27k if battery or brake actuator appears later
items.forumWatchouts: Owner reports focus on battery health, inverter pump, brake actuator, AC compressor cost, and underbody rust.
items.shortlistNote: Same Prius logic as above. Mileage is high, but this model is one of the strongest 'cheap automatic commuter' options here.

items.riskNote: Good reliability reputation, but ask for CVT service history.
items.serviceDue: Soon: CVT fluid now if undocumented, then plugs, coolant, brake fluid, mounts, and suspension checks.
items.serviceCost: 2k-6k SEK routine; 7k-12k if CVT symptoms start
items.forumWatchouts: Jazz owners warn about CVT judder/whine when fluid is ignored, plus rust, rear brakes, and tired engine mounts.
items.shortlistNote: The strongest cheap non-hybrid option I found. Honda Jazz is usually a good bet, but ask specifically about CVT fluid/service history.

items.riskNote: Best model-level reliability signal in this widened budget pool.
items.serviceDue: Soon: e-CVT fluid if undocumented, plugs/coolant history, water-pump check, and suspension inspection.
items.serviceCost: 2k-7k SEK routine; 14k-27k if battery or brake actuator appears later
items.forumWatchouts: Owner reports focus on battery health, inverter pump, brake actuator, AC compressor cost, and underbody rust.
items.shortlistNote: Another Prius that fits the brief well. Not as local as the Uppsala cars, but still close enough to be practical.

items.riskNote: Promising mainly because of mileage, not because the model evidence is strongest.
items.serviceDue: Soon: plugs, coolant, brake fluid, suspension wear items, and timing-belt history if the engine uses one.
items.serviceCost: 2k-6k SEK
items.forumWatchouts: These are simpler bets, but owners still warn against skipped belt work, tired dampers, and rusty exhausts.
items.shortlistNote: Not as proven as Prius or Jazz, but the mileage is unusually low for the budget and makes it worth serious inspection.

items.riskNote: Best model-level reliability signal in this widened budget pool.

items.shortlistNote: Local Prius and the strongest nearby overall candidate.

items.riskNote: Best model-level reliability signal in this widened budget pool.
items.serviceDue: Soon: e-CVT fluid if undocumented, plugs/coolant history, water-pump check, and suspension inspection.
items.serviceCost: 2k-7k SEK routine; 14k-27k if battery or brake actuator appears later
items.forumWatchouts: Owner reports focus on battery health, inverter pump, brake actuator, AC compressor cost, and underbody rust.
items.shortlistNote: Another Uppsala Prius, nearly the same logic as the one above.

items.riskNote: Good reliability reputation, but ask for CVT service history.
items.serviceDue: Soon: CVT fluid now if undocumented, then plugs, coolant, brake fluid, mounts, and suspension checks.
items.serviceCost: 2k-6k SEK routine; 7k-12k if CVT symptoms start
items.forumWatchouts: Jazz owners warn about CVT judder/whine when fluid is ignored, plus rust, rear brakes, and tired engine mounts.
items.shortlistNote: The cheapest nearby car I would still take seriously first.

items.riskNote: Promising mainly because of mileage, not because the model evidence is strongest.
items.serviceDue: Soon: plugs, coolant, brake fluid, suspension wear items, and timing-belt history if the engine uses one.
items.serviceCost: 2k-6k SEK
items.forumWatchouts: These are simpler bets, but owners still warn against skipped belt work, tired dampers, and rusty exhausts.
items.shortlistNote: Very low mileage for the money and right in Uppsala.

items.riskNote: Good reliability reputation, but ask for CVT service history.
items.serviceDue: Soon: CVT fluid now if undocumented, then plugs, coolant, brake fluid, mounts, and suspension checks.
items.serviceCost: 2k-6k SEK routine; 7k-12k if CVT symptoms start
items.forumWatchouts: Jazz owners warn about CVT judder/whine when fluid is ignored, plus rust, rear brakes, and tired engine mounts.
items.shortlistNote: Older than ideal, but Arlandastad is convenient and Jazz is still one of the safer model families here.

shortlists.title: Lowest-mileage cars worth inspecting
shortlists.description: This list is sorted by mileage appeal, not by reliability alone. Some of these have transmission caveats, so lower mileage does not automatically mean lower risk.

items.riskNote: Promising mainly because of mileage, not because the model evidence is strongest.
items.serviceDue: Soon: plugs, coolant, brake fluid, suspension wear items, and timing-belt history if the engine uses one.
items.serviceCost: 2k-6k SEK
items.forumWatchouts: These are simpler bets, but owners still warn against skipped belt work, tired dampers, and rusty exhausts.
items.shortlistNote: Mileage standout. This is why it makes the main shortlist despite thinner model-level evidence than Prius/Jazz.

items.riskNote: Peugeot 207 automatic is one of the riskier drivetrain bets here.
items.serviceDue: Soon: AL4 gearbox service and solenoid health check, plus timing belt and water-pump proof.
items.serviceCost: 3k-7k SEK service; 12k-20k SEK if gearbox rebuild arrives
items.forumWatchouts: 207 automatic discussions keep circling back to harsh shifts, limp mode, cooling leaks, and electrical gremlins.
items.shortlistNote: Very attractive mileage, but I would still de-rank it because Peugeot 207 automatic drivetrains are not a reliability-first choice.

items.trim: 5-dörrar 1.0 SensoDrive | Automat| Ny serv | Ny besikt
items.riskNote: These city cars are attractive, but the robotized gearbox is the weak point.
items.serviceDue: Soon: clutch wear check, actuator adaptation, plugs, coolant, and front-suspension inspection.
items.serviceCost: 2k-5k SEK routine; 7k-13k clutch; 5k-13k actuator
items.forumWatchouts: Owner forums mention jerky take-off, flashing N or gearbox warnings, actuator noise, leaks, and cold-start chain rattle.
items.shortlistNote: Excellent mileage for the money, but the SensoDrive gearbox is the main caution.

items.riskNote: Toyota Yaris MultiMode is a real actuator/clutch risk.
items.serviceDue: Soon: prove clutch plus actuator history, gearbox relearn/calibration, and gearbox-oil service if unknown.
items.serviceCost: 1k-3k SEK service; 6k-18k if clutch or actuator is next
items.forumWatchouts: MMT owners keep warning about hesitation, harsh shifts, sudden neutral, and actuator failures that wipe out the bargain.
items.shortlistNote: Mileage looks good, but Toyota Yaris MultiMode is exactly the kind of car I would not trust blindly just because it is a Toyota.

items.riskNote: These city cars are attractive, but the robotized gearbox is the weak point.
items.serviceDue: Soon: clutch wear check, actuator adaptation, plugs, coolant, and front-suspension inspection.
items.serviceCost: 2k-5k SEK routine; 7k-13k clutch; 5k-13k actuator
items.forumWatchouts: Owner forums mention jerky take-off, flashing N or gearbox warnings, actuator noise, leaks, and cold-start chain rattle.
items.shortlistNote: Good mileage and local, but Aygo MultiMode still means actuator/clutch risk.

shortlists.title: Smallest and easiest city-car options
shortlists.description: These are the compact city-car choices the search actually surfaced. They are attractive on size and fuel use, but the robotized gearboxes are the catch.

items.trim: 5-dörrar 1.0 SensoDrive | Automat| Ny serv | Ny besikt
items.riskNote: These city cars are attractive, but the robotized gearbox is the weak point.
items.serviceDue: Soon: clutch wear check, actuator adaptation, plugs, coolant, and front-suspension inspection.
items.serviceCost: 2k-5k SEK routine; 7k-13k clutch; 5k-13k actuator
items.forumWatchouts: Owner forums mention jerky take-off, flashing N or gearbox warnings, actuator noise, leaks, and cold-start chain rattle.
items.shortlistNote: Best-looking C1 in the widened run on mileage, but only if the gearbox works cleanly and the actuator history is reassuring.

items.riskNote: These city cars are attractive, but the robotized gearbox is the weak point.
items.serviceDue: Soon: clutch wear check, actuator adaptation, plugs, coolant, and front-suspension inspection.
items.serviceCost: 2k-5k SEK routine; 7k-13k clutch; 5k-13k actuator
items.forumWatchouts: Owner forums mention jerky take-off, flashing N or gearbox warnings, actuator noise, leaks, and cold-start chain rattle.
items.shortlistNote: Peugeot 107 is the same basic car as Aygo/C1. Small, cheap to run, but still gearbox-sensitive.

items.riskNote: These city cars are attractive, but the robotized gearbox is the weak point.
items.serviceDue: Soon: clutch wear check, actuator adaptation, plugs, coolant, and front-suspension inspection.
items.serviceCost: 2k-5k SEK routine; 7k-13k clutch; 5k-13k actuator
items.forumWatchouts: Owner forums mention jerky take-off, flashing N or gearbox warnings, actuator noise, leaks, and cold-start chain rattle.
items.shortlistNote: Newer year than the other 107, but the mileage is much higher.

items.riskNote: These city cars are attractive, but the robotized gearbox is the weak point.
items.serviceDue: Soon: clutch wear check, actuator adaptation, plugs, coolant, and front-suspension inspection.
items.serviceCost: 2k-5k SEK routine; 7k-13k clutch; 5k-13k actuator
items.forumWatchouts: Owner forums mention jerky take-off, flashing N or gearbox warnings, actuator noise, leaks, and cold-start chain rattle.
items.shortlistNote: Local Aygo. Easy to live with if healthy, but I would test the transmission very carefully.

items.riskNote: These city cars are attractive, but the robotized gearbox is the weak point.
items.serviceDue: Soon: clutch wear check, actuator adaptation, plugs, coolant, and front-suspension inspection.
items.serviceCost: 2k-5k SEK routine; 7k-13k clutch; 5k-13k actuator
items.forumWatchouts: Owner forums mention jerky take-off, flashing N or gearbox warnings, actuator noise, leaks, and cold-start chain rattle.
items.shortlistNote: Another local Aygo, but higher mileage and the same MultiMode warning.

shortlists.title: Cars I would de-rank or avoid
shortlists.description: These are the cars that may look tempting on brand, mileage, or price, but I would put them below the main shortlist because the drivetrain risk is too visible.

items.riskNote: Toyota Yaris MultiMode is a real actuator/clutch risk.
items.serviceDue: Soon: prove clutch plus actuator history, gearbox relearn/calibration, and gearbox-oil service if unknown.
items.serviceCost: 1k-3k SEK service; 6k-18k if clutch or actuator is next
items.forumWatchouts: MMT owners keep warning about hesitation, harsh shifts, sudden neutral, and actuator failures that wipe out the bargain.
items.shortlistNote: Toyota Yaris badge looks comforting, but MultiMode is the problem, not the engine.

items.riskNote: Toyota Yaris MultiMode is a real actuator/clutch risk.
items.serviceDue: Soon: prove clutch plus actuator history, gearbox relearn/calibration, and gearbox-oil service if unknown.
items.serviceCost: 1k-3k SEK service; 6k-18k if clutch or actuator is next
items.forumWatchouts: MMT owners keep warning about hesitation, harsh shifts, sudden neutral, and actuator failures that wipe out the bargain.
items.shortlistNote: Same Yaris MultiMode warning, plus higher mileage.

items.trim: 5dörr 1.6 Dual VVT-i Aut Dragk Nybesiktigad Nykoppling
items.riskNote: Toyota Auris MultiMode is not a reliability-first automatic.
items.serviceDue: Soon: confirm clutch job quality, actuator health, calibration, and gearbox-oil history.
items.serviceCost: 1k-3k SEK service; 6k-18k if actuator or another clutch job follows
items.forumWatchouts: Auris MMT threads sound like Yaris MMT threads: jerky shifts, neutral faults, and expensive actuator drama.
items.shortlistNote: The 'new clutch' wording is exactly what makes this Auris feel like a transmission-risk story, not a safe buy.

items.riskNote: Toyota Auris MultiMode is not a reliability-first automatic.
items.serviceDue: Soon: confirm clutch job quality, actuator health, calibration, and gearbox-oil history.
items.serviceCost: 1k-3k SEK service; 6k-18k if actuator or another clutch job follows
items.forumWatchouts: Auris MMT threads sound like Yaris MMT threads: jerky shifts, neutral faults, and expensive actuator drama.
items.shortlistNote: Auris MultiMode again. I would not treat it as a low-risk Toyota just because of the badge.

items.riskNote: Peugeot 207 automatic is one of the riskier drivetrain bets here.
items.serviceDue: Soon: AL4 gearbox service and solenoid health check, plus timing belt and water-pump proof.
items.serviceCost: 3k-7k SEK service; 12k-20k SEK if gearbox rebuild arrives
items.forumWatchouts: 207 automatic discussions keep circling back to harsh shifts, limp mode, cooling leaks, and electrical gremlins.
items.shortlistNote: Tempting mileage, but Peugeot 207 automatic is too easy to regret in this budget range.
